mlb_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 6.17 K/9 over 18 appearances (18 starts)
Los Angeles Dodgers lineup pitch-type K matchup neutral (2666 pitches): four-seamers 39% mix: 21% whiff, 20% K-ending PA; changeups 25% mix: 24% whiff, 20% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal four-seamers 39%, changeups 25%, curves 17% with 21.4% whiffs/swing
Venue UNIQLO Field at Dodger Stadium, park factor 0.98
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 73.4%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 24.2%; Under history hit rate 43-100 (43.0%)

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 5.49 K/9 over 17 appearances (17 starts)
Seattle Mariners lineup pitch-type K matchup resistant (2218 pitches): sinkers 33% mix: 14% whiff, 15% K-ending PA; changeups 27% mix: 29% whiff, 19% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal sinkers 33%, changeups 27%, cutters 21% with 17.7% whiffs/swing
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 64.7%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 34.1%; Under history hit rate 183-217 (84.3%)

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 6.70 K/9 over 19 appearances (19 starts)
Cleveland Guardians lineup pitch-type K matchup neutral (2356 pitches): sinkers 28% mix: 16% whiff, 14% K-ending PA; changeups 21% mix: 33% whiff, 23% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal sinkers 28%, changeups 21%, four-seamers 18% with 20.9% whiffs/swing
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 63.4%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 35.7%; Under history hit rate 65-111 (58.6%)

wnba_3pm.method: WNBA 3PM props using 3PA volume, shrinkage-adjusted 3P%, season/history profiles, L10 form, venue, opponent, injury, and consensus gates

key_factors: WNBA3PM relaxed consensus floor active at 55% (15% lower).
Consensus gate rejected publication: three_pointers_made has not cleared 70%
